mapper.sql: recycling_id , special_id, slide_num, expire_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select fsr.recycling_id, tt.topic_name, fs.special_name, ts.name speciesName, ts.name_en speciesNameEn, fs.trial_type, fs.color_type, fsr.slide_num, su.user_name createName, fs.create_time createTime, fsr.create_time recoveryTime, fsr.expire_time from fr_special_recycling fsr left join fr_special fs on fsr.special_id = fs.special_id left join tb_topic tt on fs.topic_id = tt.topic_id left join tb_species ts on fs.species_id = ts.species_id left join sys_user su on fs.create_by = su.user_id and fs.organization_id = #{organizationId} where fsr.del_flag = '0'
and tt.topic_name like concat('%', #{topicName}, '%')
and fs.special_name like concat('%', #{specialName}, '%')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{createTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{createTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fsr.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{recoveryTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fsr.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{recoveryTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fsr.expire_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{expireTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fsr.expire_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{expireTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by fsr.create_time desc
